warranty: Backed by MiStore support, plus manufacturer warranty as provided by Sohigh Solar. (Designed lifespan and cycle life below are product specifications, not a warranty term.)
note: Prices include sea shipping. Final delivered price (inland freight, clearance & local delivery) is confirmed on WhatsApp before payment.

systems.name: 1.28 KWh / 1.5 KVA Solar System
systems.summary: Starter off-grid kit for lights, TV, fans and phone charging. 1.5KVA hybrid inverter + 1.28KWh lithium battery.
includes: Sohigh Off-Grid 1.5K hybrid inverter — 1.5KW, 12V, built-in MPPT (max PV 1000W)
Accessories kit — battery & panel cables, DC/AC breakers, DC/AC surge protectors (SPD), panel connectors

systems.name: 2.56 KWh / 4 KVA Solar System
systems.summary: Mid-size off-grid kit for a small home or shop. Powerful 4KVA hybrid inverter + 2.56KWh lithium battery.
includes: Sohigh Off-Grid 4K hybrid inverter — 4KW, 24V, built-in MPPT (max PV 5,500W)
Accessories kit — battery & panel cables, DC/AC breakers, DC/AC surge protectors (SPD), panel connectors

systems.name: 5 KWh / 4 KVA Solar System
systems.summary: Whole-home off-grid kit. 4KVA hybrid inverter + big 5KWh lithium battery for all-day backup.
includes: Sohigh Off-Grid 4K hybrid inverter — 4KW, 24V, built-in MPPT (max PV 5,500W)
Accessories kit — battery & panel cables, DC/AC breakers, DC/AC surge protectors (SPD), panel connectors

systems.name: 5 KWh / 4 KVA Solar System + 4×600W Panels
systems.summary: Complete solar power station — everything in the 5KWh kit plus four 600W bifacial panels to charge from the sun.
includes: Sohigh Off-Grid 4K hybrid inverter — 4KW, 24V, built-in MPPT (max PV 5,500W)
Accessories kit — battery & panel cables, DC/AC breakers, DC/AC surge protectors (SPD), panel connectors
